//: SHA-pinned Android corpus for the Android a11y-checker XML lane (ADR 0006, lane 1). Each entry is frozen at an exact commit so the only thing that can move the numbers is THIS checker's own code (the Android XML producer: src/android-xml-ast.ts, src/android-xml-rules.ts, src/collect-android-xml.ts), never upstream repo drift. The gated quantity is the finding stream the in-process XML producer emits over each repo's res/layout XML — exactly like shopify-matrix / unity-matrix. The gate is live: `pnpm android:matrix:run` (clone+scan -> results/), `pnpm android:matrix:baseline` (re-bless baseline.json), `pnpm android:matrix:check` (re-scan + diff, non-zero on drift). The Kotlin/Compose lanes (2/3) are NOT gated here — they need the built JVM engine and are validated separately (COMPOSE-EVIDENCE.md + the engine's unit tests). To extend the corpus: add a public XML-layout-heavy Android app, resolve its sha (`git ls-remote https://github.com/<owner>/<repo> HEAD`), append an entry, then `pnpm android:matrix:run && pnpm android:matrix:baseline`.

repos.source: Lightweight YouTube/streaming front-end. 116 hand-written res/layout files (301 incl. -land / -v21 / config variants), heavy on icon-only media controls (play/pause/seek/repeat/shuffle) — the canonical TalkBack failure surface. No forms.
repos.caveat: Compose-free, classic Android Views — exercises image-no-label + control-no-name but NOT editable-no-label (no EditText forms).

repos.source: Podcast manager. 117 hand-written res/layout files (314 incl. variants), forms-heavy — settings, dialogs, search — so it exercises editable-no-label and Material TextInputLayout, which NewPipe does not.
repos.caveat: Mix of plain EditText (real findings) and Material TextInputLayout-wrapped fields (label is the parent's job — suppressed).
